build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 50, 12)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=12).rect(40, 40).extrude(2)
STEP 4: Create bolt circle — .workplane("XY").centered(25, 25).circle(18).extrude(12)
STEP 5: Add bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-17.32, -17.32).circle(4).cutThruAll()
STEP 6: Repeat step 5 for each of the other two bolt holes at positions (17.32, -17.32) and (-17.32, 17.32)
